final:
module RefModule(
  input clk,
  input rst,
  output reg [7:0] count
);parameter MAX_COUNT = 255; // Maximum value that the counter should count to

    wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if(rst == 1) begin
      count <= 0;
    end
    else if(count == MAX_COUNT) begin
      count <= 0;
    end
    else begin
      count <= count + 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
